overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking along a modern urban waterfront promenade with distinctive glass skyscrapers in the background. The character proceeds along the paved walkway, turns to follow the water's edge past an underground entrance, then turns around to walk back toward the skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade approaching glass skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide paved promenade toward the tall glass skyscrapers in the distance

entered.detail: tall curved glass skyscraper reflecting the cloudy sky, dominating the skyline ahead
low-rise beige concrete office building with rows of windows running parallel to the path
wide stone-tiled pedestrian walkway with light beige coloring
green leafy trees lining the edge of the open plaza area
dark asphalt road running parallel to the promenade on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a spacious paved promenade with a modern glass skyscraper complex visible ahead in the distance. To the right, a beige office building runs parallel to the path, while trees and an asphalt road are visible on the left side of the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with building on left and river on right

events.description: character turns right to follow the waterfront path along the river

agents.ego_description: turning right to walk along the waterfront railing, passing an underground entrance structure on the left

entered.detail: dark metal railing with vertical posts separating the walkway from the water
calm gray-green river water extending to the horizon
concrete structure with stairs descending underground and red signage on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to walk along the waterfront, with the beige office building now on the left and a metal railing separating the path from the river on the right. An underground entrance structure with concrete walls and red signs becomes visible ahead on the left as the character proceeds along the water's edge.

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the original direction

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back toward the glass skyscrapers, leaving the waterfront behind

entered.detail: tall curved glass skyscraper coming back into view ahead as the character turns around
green leafy trees visible again on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back toward the distant skyscrapers, retracing steps along the promenade. The waterfront railing and river exit the frame as the office building returns to the right side, and the glass skyscrapers come back into view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a modern urban promenade that shifts from an open plaza toward the waterfront before returning to a view of the city skyline. It begins with the character walking across a spacious paved area toward a distant complex of glass skyscrapers, flanked by a beige office building and a tree-lined road. As the character turns right, the scene shifts to the water's edge, where a metal railing separates the path from the river and a concrete underground entrance with red signs appears on the left. The camera then pivots as the character turns around to retrace their steps, causing the waterfront to exit the frame. Finally, the perspective opens back up as the beige office building returns to the right and the glass skyscrapers once again dominate the horizon ahead.
